_doc: Test data for all 5 pipeline paths - INDIA (use with POL-COMP-IN-TEST or POL-TP-IN-TEST)

_paths.A: Normal:       intake -> fraud_crew -> damage_assessor -> policy_checker -> settlement -> evaluator -> communication
_paths.B: HITL:         intake -> fraud_crew -> hitl_checkpoint -> [paused for reviewer] -> communication
_paths.E: Fast Mode:    intake -> settlement -> communication (skips fraud + damage)

_how_to_use: Submit each claim via the UI (Submit Claim page) or POST to /api/claims/submit. Use the holder_name that matches your logged-in user.

path_a_normal_approved._path: A - Normal (low fraud, full pipeline, expected: approved with deductible)
path_a_normal_approved._trigger: Reasonable amount (~avg for own_damage), detailed description, proper docs, low fraud signals
path_a_normal_approved._expected_outcome: Approved or approved_partial after deductible (₹85K - ₹2K deductible - depreciation)
path_a_normal_approved.incident_description: My car was hit by a truck while parked at MG Road, Bengaluru. The front bumper, left headlight assembly, and hood are significantly damaged. I have photographs of the damage and a detailed repair estimate from the authorized Maruti Suzuki service center at Koramangala. The truck driver fled the scene. A bystander witnessed the incident and provided a statement. No injuries occurred.

path_b_hitl_high_fraud._path: B - HITL Required (fraud score >= 0.65, pipeline pauses for human review)
path_b_hitl_high_fraud._trigger: Brand new policy + theft + max amount (= IDV) + no police report + lost all keys -> fraud score >= 0.65
path_b_hitl_high_fraud._expected_outcome: Pipeline pauses at hitl_checkpoint, status = pending_human_review
path_b_hitl_high_fraud.incident_description: My brand new car was stolen from outside my house last night. I had just purchased this insurance policy 2 weeks ago. The car was parked on the street with no CCTV coverage. I have no GPS tracker installed. I lost all duplicate keys as well. The entire vehicle is gone. I am claiming the full insured declared value.

path_c_auto_reject_confirmed_fraud._path: C - Auto-Reject (fraud score >= 0.90 + CONFIRMED risk level, no human review needed)
path_c_auto_reject_confirmed_fraud._trigger: Blatant fraud self-admission + impossible claim frequency + fabricated vehicle
path_c_auto_reject_confirmed_fraud.incident_description: Vehicle stolen. I bought this policy yesterday specifically because I knew my car would be stolen tonight. This is my 5th theft claim this year on different policies with different insurers. I have been filing fraudulent claims across ICICI Lombard, HDFC Ergo, and Bajaj Allianz. The car registration number is fake and the vehicle does not actually exist. I am doing this intentionally for the insurance money.

path_d_intake_failure_invalid_claim._path: D - Intake Failure (policy inactive on incident date -> instant denial at intake)
path_d_intake_failure_invalid_claim._trigger: Incident date 2024-01-15 is BEFORE policy start date 2025-06-01 -> policy not active
path_d_intake_failure_invalid_claim._expected_outcome: Denied at intake, only 2 agents run (intake + communication), no fraud/damage/settlement
path_d_intake_failure_invalid_claim.incident_description: Car was damaged in an accident two years ago near Electronic City, Bengaluru. Filing the claim now as I only recently learned about the insurance coverage.

path_e_fast_mode_small_claim._path: E - Fast Mode (amount < ₹500 threshold, skips fraud_crew + damage_assessor)
path_e_fast_mode_small_claim._trigger: Estimated amount ₹400 < fast_mode.max_amount (500) -> skip directly to settlement
path_e_fast_mode_small_claim._expected_outcome: Likely denied (deductible ₹2K > claim ₹400). To test fast-mode APPROVAL, use POL-TP-IN-TEST (₹0 deductible) with third_party_property type.
path_e_fast_mode_small_claim.incident_description: Minor scratch on the rear bumper while reversing in the apartment parking lot at Whitefield, Bengaluru. Small paint damage only, no structural dent. Cosmetic repair needed.

path_e_fast_mode_approved_variant._path: E - Fast Mode APPROVAL variant (₹0 deductible policy, small claim -> approved)
path_e_fast_mode_approved_variant._trigger: Amount ₹400 < 500 threshold + TP policy has ₹0 deductible -> should be approved
path_e_fast_mode_approved_variant._expected_outcome: Approved, settlement ~₹400 (no deductible on TP policy)
path_e_fast_mode_approved_variant.incident_description: My vehicle slightly scraped a parked scooter while navigating a narrow lane in Koregaon Park, Pune. Minor scratch on the scooter's side panel. Owner is requesting ₹400 for repair.
